name: Cherries 'n Cream Squares
recipeInstructions:
1. Preheat oven to 350 degrees Fahrenheit.
2. Prepare an 8 x 8 x 2-inch pan with cooking spray and flour; set aside.
3. To prepare the crust, combine graham cracker crumbs, 2 tablespoons powdered sugar, and margarine. Press into bottom of prepared pan.
4. To prepare the filling, combine cream cheese, remaining sugar, vanilla, marshmallows, and whipped topping. Spread into crust.
5. Meanwhile, to prepare the topping, combine cherry pie filling and almond extract. Spread over cream cheese layer.
6. Refrigerate several hours or until firm.
